prompt: A long, narrow corridor stretches into the distance, its walls and ceiling showing signs of age and neglect. The floor is cracked concrete, littered with small debris and patches of green weeds pushing through the cracks. Along the right wall, a series of rusted metal barriers stand at intervals, their surfaces weathered and stained. The left wall is similarly worn, with peeling paint revealing darker layers beneath. Above, fluorescent lights hang from the ceiling, casting a cool, dim glow that highlights the texture of the crumbling surfaces. A red "EXIT" sign glows faintly at the far end of the passage, its light the only vibrant color in the otherwise muted, gray-toned environment. The camera moves steadily forward, revealing more of the corridor's length and the repeating pattern of barriers and decay.
